signals.title: Senate NDAA backs plan to fold SDA, Space RCO into Space Force
signals.summary:
The committee's 2027 defense bill would eliminate separate statutory requirements for the two acquisition organizations while advancing broader Pentagon procurement reforms 
 The post  Senate NDAA backs plan to fold SDA, Space RCO into Space Force  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Trump picks former SEC Chairman Jay Clayton as national intelligence director
signals.summary: Trump's announcement came after House Democrats' objections to his pick of Bill Pulte as acting chief ensured that a key national security tool expires Friday.

signals.summary: Elon Musk's SpaceX defies typical market buckets, and the IPO will give Wall Street another chance to value "strategic tech" like Palantir.

signals.title: Coinbase launches tool to let AI agents manage trading and payments

signals.title: Some large Virginia customers face hurdles to using generators for demand response participation

signals.summary: Utility-scale solar generation is expected to increase 19% this summer compared with last summer, reflecting a 20% increase in capacity, said the Energy Information Administration.

signals.summary: The region should have adequate resources to meet typical electricity demand, but some areas may need to implement emergency procedures or rely on imports during grid stress, NPCC said.

signals.summary: Eversource Energy and other transmission owners in New England could see ramifications from the ruling that the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission can order refunds for multi-year periods.
